release_notes: Reinstall actually does something (was a no-op when installed == latest because installVersion early-returned on existing targetDir; now passes force:true that wipes the dir first). Launcher self-update helper rewritten as PowerShell .ps1 + spawned with -WindowStyle Hidden — no more visible cmd window with timeout /t 4 during the update. Added an «Установлен актуальный движок» badge in the engine section when versions match.
